per_item.question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?

per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

per_item.question: For bladder cancer trials, what is the median follow-up time in months?
per_item.pred_sql:

FROM clinical_trials

per_item.question: What is the median follow-up duration in months for treatment and control arms in Mesothelioma trials?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" AS REAL)) AS "Median Follow-up Duration Rx (months)",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" AS REAL)) AS "Median Follow-up Duration Control (months)"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE
  "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma'
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of follow-up given", "Cancer type", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab, Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

per_item.question: Find colorectal cancer trials reporting median follow-up duration in months for both treatment and control arms?
per_item.pred_sql: SELECT * FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" IS NOT NULL AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" != '' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" IS NOT NULL AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" != ''
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Type of follow-up given", "Cancer type", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

per_item.question: Which trials of Nivolumab and Ipilimumab in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer used Chemo as the control?
per_item.pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' AND "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Ipilimumab%' AND "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer' AND "Type of control" = 'Chemo'
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab, Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

per_item.question: Find Bladder cancer trials using PD1 where PD‑L1 positivity was not an inclusion criterion?
per_item.pred_sql: SELECT * FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Bladder' AND "Class of ICI" LIKE '%PD1%' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No'
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Bladder' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';
